_comment: Opik Trace Manager — config file example
_comment_projects: List of project names to target. Omit or set to [] to target ALL projects in the workspace.
_comment_modes: Use EITHER 'filters' (single pass) OR 'ttl_rules' (multi-pass). If both are present, ttl_rules wins.
_comment_filters: --- OPTION A: flat filters (single deletion pass) ---

filters._comment: Delete traces older than N days (mutually exclusive with 'before')
filters._comment_before: 'before' is an alternative to older_than_days — ISO 8601 date string
filters._comment_after: Only target traces created after this date (optional lower bound)
filters._comment_tags: Include only traces that contain ALL of these tags (leave empty [] for no tag filter)
filters._comment_exclude: Exclude traces that contain ANY of these tags

_comment_ttl: --- OPTION B: TTL rules (multiple passes, processed shortest-retention first) ---

ttl_rules.description: Default catch-all — traces with none of the above tags
